title: Level 606/offset3
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 606: "Incarcerated Scarfaces"}} {{Warning|text=blood|content=visual photos of blood}} ---- {{Class 5|color-h=720|color-s=100%|color-l=35%}} == Description == {{Blurimage|file=dsj.png|caption=A bloody bathroom.‎}} '''Level 606''' is a decrepit complex consisting of expansive office bathroom and cramped, lengthy corridors. The level's condition reflects extensive temporal decay. Tiles often collapse, and so do parts of the ceiling. The carpet is dirty and infested with empty soda cans, papers, and garbage bags. Mirrors are cracked, sinks are shattered, and graffiti can be commonly seen on the walls, among other things. A notable feature of '''Level 606''' is the abundance of blood. It can commonly be seen on the walls, floor, and mirrors. However, after a sample was closely examined, it was determined that this blood is not that of a human; instead, it is thought to be artificial. As mentioned previously, the level is severely unstable, and an environmental hazard, due to the debris that commonly collapse on wanderers. Certain sections of the ceiling reveal exposed wiring and faulty lighting systems; instead, the primary sources of illumination within the level are the numerous flashlights that can be found within. Their origins are unknown, thought it is thought that they were left by those unfortunate enough to enter the level previously. Other objects can be found in seemingly random places of the complex, including chairs, ladders, posters and miscellaneous items. These objects are often coated in a layer of dust, though some of them appear eerily pristine compared to their surroundings. Their sole purpose is to provide a hinderance to one's movement, as they can frequently be found blocking rooms and areas that would've normally been accesible. Certain rooms within the level additionally contain pillars which support the roof; some of these pillars are tilted, and some have completely collapsed, which implies that the level's condition will only get worse over time.[[File:606.png|center|560x560px|thumb]]'''Level 606''' is almost entirely silent. Noise levels fluctuates near zero decibels, which is enough for a wanderer to hear their own heartbeat. However, complete silence is never achieved; for unknown reasons, one may occasionally hear a hum reminiscent to the one found in [[Level 0]]. This is impossible because the level's lighting system is dysfunctional, and even if it functioned, the hum would not be present because it doesn't run on a fluorescent system. The temperature usually fluctuates from 6c to -3c, thought the lowest recorded temperature was -10c. Even if the temperature isn't necessarily freezing, it still has the effects of one. Wanderers will frequently shake, and gushes of wind will become stronger. Some individuals have even reported that the ground feels like snow, depending on what type of footwear they're wearing. Unlike the majority of levels within the Backrooms, '''Level''' '''606''' has completely euclidean geometry, mimicing the one in the [[The Frontrooms|Frontrooms]]. This makes movement around the level incredibly easy, and allows the level to be fully mapped. The complex is surprisingly small compared to other Levels, with the estimated size hovering around 250,000 square meters (0,25 square kilometers or 2,691,000 square feet). However, a full map of the level has not been made, and attempts to create it have been cancelled due to the dangers within '''Level 606'''. == The Sickosick Virus == {{Phenomenon Class||frequency=4|effectiveness=5|danger=5|width=}}'''The Sickosick Virus''' is an anomalous pathogen that manifests exclusively within Level 606. This multi-stage virus is both physically and mentally harmful. It is immediately contracted whenever a person enters Level 606, and stops progressing once the level is exited. The physical mutations from the virus will remain intact, thought they will slowly decrease in severity until the face's muscles return back to normal. Upon infection, the Sickosick Virus causes a series of physical and psychological mutations that progress with time, ultimately resulting in death. The most notable aspect of the virus is the ever-widening smile that overtakes its host. The longer the infection persists, the wider the smile grows, and the more profoundly the host’s mentality deteriorates. There is no known cure to the virus, however, energy drinks have resulted in the delay of progression, which gives the host more time to escape whilst they are still in control of their mind. === Stage 1 === The initial stage of the Sickosick Virus begins immediately. Upon entering Level 606, an individual may feel twitching in the muscles of their face, eventually leading to an small grin. The victim experiences mild dizziness, accompanied by a rising sense of unease. However, this stage typically lacks any significant cognitive decline—though the mind may start to feel ''oddly lighter''.The victim may begin to struggle with focus and feel disconnected from their own actions, but they can still function at a basic level. This stage usually lasts 4 to 5 hours. === Stage 2 === As the virus continues its progression, the infected individual’s smile widens further. By this stage, the smile has become slightly painful, as the muscles of the face stretch more than usual, causing tension in the jaw and cheeks. Cognitive decline accelerates at this stage. Victims exhibit difficulty forming coherent thoughts, often forgetting simple words and failing basic tasks. At this stage, the body also begins to show signs of physical decay, with muscle control becoming more erratic. Victims may appear as though they’re constantly trying to maintain their balance, with their movements becoming more and more uncoordinated. This stage usually lasts 3 to 5 hours. === Stage 3 === By the third stage, the smile becomes incredibly wide, stretching so far across the victim's face that their jaw might tear. The muscles of the face now remain fully frozen in this expression at all times. The discomfort and pain caused by the mutation become unbearable, yet the victim loses the ability to express distress. Mentally, the victim is nearly irretrievable. Cognitive functions decline to the point where speech becomes incoherent, and memory is almost entirely lost. Survivors at this stage report that the victim’s eyes become vacant, and their mind appears trapped in a haze of nonsensical thoughts. The victim may no longer recognize familiar faces or surroundings, often walking in aimless circles or attempting to engage in meaningless actions. It is worth noting that, at this stage, most sentences said by the host are in some way related to happiness. This stage usually lasts around 2 hours === Stage 4 === In the final stage, the muscles of the face are permanently distorted, leaving the victim with an inhuman smile. The physical body becomes emaciated, unable to perform basic functions, though the infected individual remains balanced, as if they are compelled by an external force. There is no longer any semblance of human recognition in their movements or behavior. The mind has fully disintegrated. Victims in this stage are nothing more than mindless husks. They wander aimlessly through Level 606, with no sense of direction or purpose. These hosts are often found in isolated corners of the level, alone. Their fate is irreversible. After a few hours in this state, the victim's brain will be completely dysfunctional, and thus, their heart will stop, and they will die. == Entities == He is not here right now. == Colonies and Outposts == Due to the dangerous nature of the level, no colonies or outposts have been established. == Entrances and Exits == === Entrances === As of now, there are two documented exits. The first is to find and enter a see-through door with a dim hospital room behind it in any level, the second is to sit and smile in any area of [[Level 605]] for a minute. === Exits === The most reliable means of exit is finding a container of Moth Jelly and consuming the Moth Jelly inside. This leads to [[Level 9.2]]. Alternatively, if one finds themselves in a room with shattered beer bottles upon entry, they will be sent to [[Level 85]] within mere seconds.
